title: Bellamy Attacks the Dreamers
description: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What's up with this praying man'tis!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What's wrong with this entire forest!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How can a bird order around bugs!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Is it a dung beetle's dung!?

summary: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
